name: Cinnamon Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Do NOT replace the butter in this recipe for anything else. The results are not the same.
2. Peel and slice the potatoes.
3. Peel and chop the onions.
4. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
5. Place the potatoes and chopped onions in the hot skillet.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Stir in the cinnamon (use about 2 tablespoons, adjusting to your preference).
8. Fry the potatoes until they are tender and slightly browned, turning occasionally.
9. This dish pairs well with scrambled eggs or fried eggs served with crisp bacon.
